dingtalk.label: DingTalk
dingtalk.description: 钉钉企业内部机器人，使用 Stream 模式，无需公网 IP。

name.description: Optional display name shown for this DingTalk channel or default account.

enabled.description: Enable or disable this DingTalk channel configuration without deleting saved credentials.

agentId.description: Legacy compatibility field from older setup flows. The current Stream-mode runtime no longer reads this value, so new configs should omit it.

corpId.description: Legacy compatibility field from older enterprise app setup flows. The current Stream-mode runtime no longer needs or reads this value.

clientId.description: DingTalk App Key (Client ID) used to authenticate API and Stream connections.

clientSecret.description: DingTalk App Secret (Client Secret) used to obtain DingTalk access tokens. Supports SecretInput references such as env/file/exec. Security boundary: file reads the configured local path, and exec runs the configured provider binary with id as its only argument; use file/exec only with trusted plugin configuration.

dmPolicy.description: Direct-message access policy. open allows any DM, pairing requires host pairing, and allowlist only permits IDs listed in allowFrom.

groupPolicy.description: Group-message access policy. open allows all groups, allowlist restricts by groupAllowFrom, and disabled blocks group handling.

allowFrom.description: User IDs allowed when dmPolicy is allowlist. Accepts DingTalk IDs or host-normalized IDs.

groupAllowFrom.description: Sender IDs allowed when groupPolicy is allowlist. Leave empty unless you want per-sender restrictions in groups.

displayNameResolution.description: Whether learned display names can be used to resolve DingTalk users or groups. Keep disabled unless you explicitly accept stale or ambiguous-name routing risk.

contextVisibility.description: Host-level context filtering before prompts are sent to the runtime. allowlist_quote is the safest advanced mode when only explicit quote or reply context should remain visible.

mediaUrlAllowlist.description: Allowed download hosts, IPs, or CIDRs for remote media fetches. Use this for internal file servers or custom CDN domains.

ackReaction.description: Acknowledgement reaction mode. Supports off, emoji, kaomoji, or a custom compatibility string.

journalTTLDays.description: Retention window in days for short-lived message context used by quoting, media recovery, and related reply context features.

debug.description: Enable verbose DingTalk channel debug logging.

messageType.description: Default reply delivery mode. markdown uses standard messages; card uses DingTalk AI cards when available.

cardTemplateId.description: Deprecated and ignored. AI card replies now always use the built-in DingTalk template contract; keep only for compatibility with old configs.

cardTemplateKey.description: Deprecated and ignored. The built-in AI card contract owns the streaming field mapping; keep only for compatibility with old configs.

groups.description: Per-group overrides keyed by conversationId. Supports "*" as a wildcard fallback.

systemPrompt.description: Additional system prompt appended for this group.

requireMention.description: Require an explicit @mention before the bot answers in this group.

groupAllowFrom.description: Per-group sender allowlist used when you want tighter access control than the channel default.

maxConnectionAttempts.description: Maximum connection attempts in a single reconnect cycle before backing off or giving up.

initialReconnectDelay.description: Initial reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

maxReconnectDelay.description: Upper bound for reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

reconnectJitter.description: Randomization factor added to reconnect backoff to avoid synchronized reconnect storms.

maxReconnectCycles.description: Maximum reconnect cycles before the channel stops retrying and waits for the next lifecycle restart.

reconnectDeadlineMs.description: Time limit in milliseconds for one reconnect cycle before starting a fresh cycle.

useConnectionManager.description: Enable the plugin connection manager. Disable only when you intentionally rely on the DingTalk client keepAlive and autoReconnect behavior.

mediaMaxMb.description: Maximum inbound media size in MB accepted by the plugin. When omitted, the runtime default is used.

keepAlive.description: Enable the underlying Stream client heartbeat. When omitted, runtime derives a default from useConnectionManager.

bypassProxyForSend.description: Bypass global or system HTTP(S) proxy settings for DingTalk send, upload, and card APIs.

proactivePermissionHint.description: Controls the proactive-send permission reminder shown when a conversation has not granted send rights yet.

enabled.description: Show the proactive-send permission hint when the runtime detects missing DingTalk proactive permission.

cooldownHours.description: Minimum cooldown in hours before the same proactive permission hint can be shown again.

cardRealTimeStream.description: Deprecated compatibility flag. If true and cardStreamingMode is unset, runtime falls back to cardStreamingMode="all". Do not use in new configs.

cardStreamingMode.description: AI card incremental streaming mode. off disables streaming, answer streams answer text only, and all streams answer plus reasoning or thinking text.

cardStreamInterval.description: Throttle interval in milliseconds between AI card streaming updates.

aicardDegradeMs.description: Cooldown window in milliseconds after AI card trigger errors. During this window replies fall back to non-card delivery.

learningEnabled.description: Enable the local feedback-learning loop for notes, reflections, and command-assisted learning.

learningAutoApply.description: Automatically apply generated learning output into session notes or global rules when available.

learningNoteTtlMs.description: Retention window in milliseconds for temporary learning notes.

convertMarkdownTables.description: Convert markdown tables to plain text before sending when you want more consistent DingTalk rendering.

cardAtSender.description: Send a follow-up @mention text after card finalization in group chats. Any non-empty string becomes the message body.

cardStatusLine.description: Status line visibility toggles for the AI card footer.

model.description: Show model name in AI card status line footer.

effort.description: Show thinking effort level in AI card status line footer.

agent.description: Show agent display name in AI card status line footer.

taskTime.description: Show task elapsed time in AI card status line footer.

tokens.description: Show token usage summary (input/output/cache) in AI card status line footer.

dapiUsage.description: Show DingTalk API call count in AI card status line footer.

showThinkingStream.description: Legacy compatibility field from older card streaming behavior. It is not used by the current runtime and new configs should omit it.

asyncMode.description: Legacy compatibility field from older host or runtime integrations. It is not used by the current runtime and new configs should omit it.

accounts.description: Named multi-account DingTalk configurations. Each account can override most top-level settings and inherits unspecified values from the top level.

name.description: Optional display name shown for this named DingTalk account.

enabled.description: Enable or disable this DingTalk account without deleting saved credentials.

clientId.description: DingTalk App Key (Client ID) used to authenticate API and Stream connections.

clientSecret.description: DingTalk App Secret (Client Secret) used to obtain DingTalk access tokens. Supports SecretInput references such as env/file/exec. Security boundary: file reads the configured local path, and exec runs the configured provider binary with id as its only argument; use file/exec only with trusted plugin configuration.

groupAllowFrom.description: Sender IDs allowed when groupPolicy is allowlist. Leave empty unless you want per-sender restrictions in groups.

journalTTLDays.description: Retention window in days for short-lived message context used by quoting, media recovery, and related reply context features.

debug.description: Enable verbose DingTalk channel debug logging.

messageType.description: Default reply delivery mode. markdown uses standard messages; card uses DingTalk AI cards when available.

cardTemplateId.description: Deprecated and ignored. AI card replies now always use the built-in DingTalk template contract; keep only for compatibility with old configs.

cardTemplateKey.description: Deprecated and ignored. The built-in AI card contract owns the streaming field mapping; keep only for compatibility with old configs.

groups.description: Per-group overrides keyed by conversationId. Supports "*" as a wildcard fallback.

systemPrompt.description: Additional system prompt appended for this group.

requireMention.description: Require an explicit @mention before the bot answers in this group.

groupAllowFrom.description: Per-group sender allowlist used when you want tighter access control than the channel default.

maxConnectionAttempts.description: Maximum connection attempts in a single reconnect cycle before backing off or giving up.

initialReconnectDelay.description: Initial reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

maxReconnectDelay.description: Upper bound for reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

reconnectJitter.description: Randomization factor added to reconnect backoff to avoid synchronized reconnect storms.

maxReconnectCycles.description: Maximum reconnect cycles before the channel stops retrying and waits for the next lifecycle restart.

reconnectDeadlineMs.description: Time limit in milliseconds for one reconnect cycle before starting a fresh cycle.

useConnectionManager.description: Enable the plugin connection manager. Disable only when you intentionally rely on the DingTalk client keepAlive and autoReconnect behavior.

mediaMaxMb.description: Maximum inbound media size in MB accepted by the plugin. When omitted, the runtime default is used.

keepAlive.description: Enable the underlying Stream client heartbeat. When omitted, runtime derives a default from useConnectionManager.

bypassProxyForSend.description: Bypass global or system HTTP(S) proxy settings for DingTalk send, upload, and card APIs.

proactivePermissionHint.description: Controls the proactive-send permission reminder shown when a conversation has not granted send rights yet.

enabled.description: Show the proactive-send permission hint when the runtime detects missing DingTalk proactive permission.

cooldownHours.description: Minimum cooldown in hours before the same proactive permission hint can be shown again.

cardRealTimeStream.description: Deprecated compatibility flag. If true and cardStreamingMode is unset, runtime falls back to cardStreamingMode="all". Do not use in new configs.

cardStreamingMode.description: AI card incremental streaming mode. off disables streaming, answer streams answer text only, and all streams answer plus reasoning or thinking text.

cardStreamInterval.description: Throttle interval in milliseconds between AI card streaming updates.

aicardDegradeMs.description: Cooldown window in milliseconds after AI card trigger errors. During this window replies fall back to non-card delivery.

learningEnabled.description: Enable the local feedback-learning loop for notes, reflections, and command-assisted learning.

learningAutoApply.description: Automatically apply generated learning output into session notes or global rules when available.

learningNoteTtlMs.description: Retention window in milliseconds for temporary learning notes.

convertMarkdownTables.description: Convert markdown tables to plain text before sending when you want more consistent DingTalk rendering.

cardAtSender.description: Send a follow-up @mention text after card finalization in group chats. Any non-empty string becomes the message body.

cardStatusLine.description: Status line visibility toggles for the AI card footer.

model.description: Show model name in AI card status line footer.

effort.description: Show thinking effort level in AI card status line footer.

agent.description: Show agent display name in AI card status line footer.

taskTime.description: Show task elapsed time in AI card status line footer.

tokens.description: Show token usage summary (input/output/cache) in AI card status line footer.

dapiUsage.description: Show DingTalk API call count in AI card status line footer.

uiHints.label: DingTalk
uiHints.help: DingTalk Stream-mode channel configuration including auth, delivery, targeting, and AI Card behavior.

name.label: Display Name
name.help: Optional display name for the default DingTalk account shown in host configuration surfaces.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn the DingTalk channel on or off without deleting the saved configuration.

agentId.label: Legacy Agent ID
agentId.help: Deprecated compatibility field from older setup flows. The current runtime ignores it, so leave it empty in new configs.

corpId.label: Legacy Corp ID
corpId.help: Deprecated compatibility field from older enterprise app setup flows. Stream mode no longer needs or reads it.

clientId.label: DingTalk Client ID
clientId.help: App Key used to authenticate DingTalk API requests.

clientSecret.label: DingTalk Client Secret
clientSecret.help: App Secret used to obtain DingTalk access tokens. SecretInput file/exec references are for trusted plugin configuration because file reads a local path and exec runs the configured provider binary.

dmPolicy.label: Direct Message Policy
dmPolicy.help: Choose who can talk to the bot in direct messages: open, host pairing only, or explicit allowlist.

groupPolicy.label: Group Message Policy
groupPolicy.help: Choose whether group messages are open to all groups, restricted by allowlist, or completely disabled.

allowFrom.label: DM Allowlist
allowFrom.help: User IDs allowed when direct message policy is set to allowlist.

groupAllowFrom.label: Group Sender Allowlist
groupAllowFrom.help: Sender IDs allowed when group policy is allowlist or when you want tighter group sender restrictions.

messageType.label: Reply Message Type
messageType.help: Choose markdown for standard replies or card for AI Card delivery.

ackReaction.label: Ack Reaction
ackReaction.help: Native acknowledgement reaction mode. Supports preset values or a custom string for backward compatibility.

displayNameResolution.label: Display Name Resolution
displayNameResolution.help: Keep disabled unless you explicitly want learned display-name targeting for all callers.

contextVisibility.label: Context Visibility
contextVisibility.help: Host-level context filtering. allowlist_quote is the safest advanced mode when you only want explicit quote/reply context.

mediaUrlAllowlist.label: Media URL Allowlist
mediaUrlAllowlist.help: Allow remote media downloads only from the specified hosts, IPs, or CIDR ranges.

journalTTLDays.label: Message Context TTL (days)
journalTTLDays.help: Retention period for short-lived quoted message and media recovery context.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose DingTalk channel debug logs for diagnostics.

cardTemplateId.label: AI Card Template ID
cardTemplateId.help: Deprecated and ignored. AI card replies now always use the built-in DingTalk template contract.

cardTemplateKey.label: AI Card Template Field Key
cardTemplateKey.help: Deprecated and ignored. The built-in AI card contract owns the streaming field mapping.

groups.label: Per-Group Overrides
groups.help: Configure conversationId-specific overrides, or use * as a wildcard fallback.

groups.systemPrompt.label: Group System Prompt
groups.systemPrompt.help: Extra system prompt appended only for the selected group.

groups.requireMention.label: Require Mention
groups.requireMention.help: Require an explicit @mention before the bot answers in that group.

groups.groupAllowFrom.label: Per-Group Sender Allowlist
groups.groupAllowFrom.help: Optional sender allowlist that overrides or tightens the channel-level group access rule.

maxConnectionAttempts.label: Max Connection Attempts
maxConnectionAttempts.help: How many connection attempts are allowed within a reconnect cycle before the cycle backs off or ends.

initialReconnectDelay.label: Initial Reconnect Delay
initialReconnectDelay.help: Initial reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

maxReconnectDelay.label: Max Reconnect Delay
maxReconnectDelay.help: Upper bound for reconnect backoff delay in milliseconds.

reconnectJitter.label: Reconnect Jitter
reconnectJitter.help: Randomization factor added to reconnect backoff to reduce synchronized reconnect storms.

maxReconnectCycles.label: Max Reconnect Cycles
maxReconnectCycles.help: Maximum reconnect cycles before the channel stops retrying and waits for a later restart.

reconnectDeadlineMs.label: Reconnect Cycle Deadline
reconnectDeadlineMs.help: Time limit in milliseconds for one reconnect cycle before starting a fresh cycle.

useConnectionManager.label: Use Connection Manager
useConnectionManager.help: Recommended default. Disable only when you intentionally rely on the DingTalk client keepAlive and autoReconnect behavior.

mediaMaxMb.label: Max Media Size (MB)
mediaMaxMb.help: Maximum inbound media size accepted by the plugin. Leave empty to use the runtime default.

keepAlive.label: Stream KeepAlive
keepAlive.help: Optional explicit heartbeat toggle for the underlying Stream client.

bypassProxyForSend.label: Bypass Proxy For Send
bypassProxyForSend.help: Skip global or system HTTP(S) proxy settings for DingTalk send, upload, and card APIs.

cardRealTimeStream.label: Legacy Real-Time Card Stream
cardRealTimeStream.help: Deprecated compatibility flag. When true and cardStreamingMode is unset, runtime falls back to all-streaming. Do not use in new configs.

cardStreamingMode.label: Card Streaming Mode
cardStreamingMode.help: Choose off, answer, or all. answer streams only answer text, while all streams answer plus reasoning or thinking text.

cardStreamInterval.label: Card Stream Interval (ms)
cardStreamInterval.help: Throttle interval in milliseconds between AI card incremental updates.

aicardDegradeMs.label: AI Card Degrade Window (ms)
aicardDegradeMs.help: Cooldown window after AI card trigger errors. Replies fall back to non-card delivery during this period.

learningEnabled.label: Learning Enabled
learningEnabled.help: Enable the local feedback-learning loop for notes, reflections, and learning commands.

learningAutoApply.label: Learning Auto Apply
learningAutoApply.help: Automatically apply generated learning output into session notes or global rules when available.

learningNoteTtlMs.label: Learning Note TTL (ms)
learningNoteTtlMs.help: Retention period for temporary learning notes.

convertMarkdownTables.label: Convert Markdown Tables
convertMarkdownTables.help: Flatten markdown tables into plain text before sending when you want more consistent DingTalk rendering.

cardAtSender.label: Card Mention Follow-Up
cardAtSender.help: Send a follow-up @mention text after card finalization in group chats. Any non-empty string becomes the message body.

cardStatusLine.label: Status Line
cardStatusLine.help: Configure which information segments appear in the AI card footer status line.

cardStatusLine.model.label: Model Name
cardStatusLine.model.help: Show the LLM model name in the AI card footer status line.

cardStatusLine.effort.label: Thinking Effort
cardStatusLine.effort.help: Show the thinking effort level (e.g. high, medium) in the AI card footer.

cardStatusLine.agent.label: Agent Name
cardStatusLine.agent.help: Show the agent display name in the AI card footer.

cardStatusLine.taskTime.label: Task Time
cardStatusLine.taskTime.help: Show elapsed task time in the AI card footer.

cardStatusLine.tokens.label: Token Usage
cardStatusLine.tokens.help: Show a compact token usage summary (input/output/cache) in the AI card footer.

cardStatusLine.dapiUsage.label: API Calls
cardStatusLine.dapiUsage.help: Show the DingTalk API call count in the AI card footer.

showThinkingStream.label: Legacy Show Thinking Stream
showThinkingStream.help: Deprecated compatibility field from older card streaming behavior. The current runtime ignores it.

asyncMode.label: Legacy Async Mode
asyncMode.help: Deprecated compatibility field from older host or runtime integrations. The current runtime ignores it.

accounts.label: Named Accounts
accounts.help: Create named DingTalk accounts when one plugin instance must serve multiple apps or tenants.

proactivePermissionHint.enabled.label: Proactive Permission Hint Enabled
proactivePermissionHint.enabled.help: Show a reminder when DingTalk proactive-send permission has not been granted.

proactivePermissionHint.cooldownHours.label: Proactive Hint Cooldown (hours)
proactivePermissionHint.cooldownHours.help: Minimum cooldown before the same proactive permission hint can be shown again.
